ui.title: SCF Financed In Total
ui.desc: Show total financed amount of different business type by today.

data.sql: select FA_BUSI_TYPE,SUM (FA_TTL_LOAN_BAL) AS VL,C_UNIT_CODE from EXIMTRX.FADA_MASTER WHERE (FA_BUSI_TYPE = 'PF' OR FA_BUSI_TYPE = 'POF' OR FA_BUSI_TYPE = 'DD') AND C_TRX_STATUS = 'M' AND C_LOCKED_FLAG = 'F' AND FA_BUSI_STATUS = 'SBR' AND (C_CP_UNIT_CODE = '{{SYS_BUSI_UNIT}}' OR C_UNIT_CODE  = '{{SYS_BUSI_UNIT}}' OR C_UNIT_CODE IS NULL OR C_CP_UNIT_CODE  IS NULL) GROUP BY FA_BUSI_TYPE,C_UNIT_CODE ORDER BY VL
